channel.title: Terraform on Joseph Smith Tech Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Terraform on Joseph Smith Tech Blog

item.title: Terraform With Azure
item.description:
Using Terraform with Azure

This post is a quick walkthrough of how you can use Terraform with Azure, replacing the need to create all the required infrastructure manually through either the Azure Portal or the CLI.

What Is Terraform?

If you’re not familiar with Terraform, it’s an IaC (Infrastructure as Code) tool which allows you to define the infrastructure your application requires to run on within a set of files you can place within the code repository. Why is that so useful? Alongside similar workflow tools such as Docs as Code, it allows you to:
